ctx.title: ctx
ctx.description:
ctx specifies the context for which the link settings should be returned.
 This can be the instance, organization,... according to the hierarchical
 model of the settings.
 If a lower level of the model is requested but not found, the fallback of
 the parent is returned.

url.title: url
url.description:
Target URL or mailto address for the link.
 Must be either a valid absolute URL (e.g., "https://example.com/tos")
 or a mailto address (e.g., "mailto:support@example.com").
 May contain language placeholders ({{.Lang}}) to support localized destinations.

translationKey.title: translation_key
translationKey.description:
Translation key for the link text.
 Required for CUSTOM links; must be empty for well-known types.

 Well-known types: labels come from the frontend i18n files, not this field.
 Custom links: this is a translation key resolved via GetHostedLoginTranslation.
 Register display text per language via SetHostedLoginTranslation.

zitadel.settings.v2.LinkSettings.title: LinkSettings
zitadel.settings.v2.LinkSettings.description:
Ordered list of links displayed in the login footer.
 The array order determines display order — there is no separate order field.
 Protobuf `repeated` fields preserve insertion order across all languages.

ctx.title: ctx
ctx.description:
ctx specifies the context for which the link settings should be reset.
 This can be the instance, organization,... according to the hierarchical
 model of the settings.

ctx.title: ctx
ctx.description:
ctx specifies the context for which the link settings should be set.
 This can be the instance, organization,... according to the hierarchical
 model of the settings.

links.title: links
links.description:
link is the collection of links to which the setting should be set.

 Validation:
   - Each well-known type (TERMS_OF_SERVICE, PRIVACY_POLICY, etc.)
     may appear at most once.
   - CUSTOM links may appear multiple times.
   - url must be a valid absolute URL or a mailto address.
   - translation_key is required when type is CUSTOM.
   - translation_key must be empty for well-known types.

zitadel.settings.v2.Source.title: Source
zitadel.settings.v2.Source.description:
Source defines the levels of hierarchy for which settings can be
 written/retrieved.
